    The future of US Fencing is at stake!

    For transparency, fairness, and athlete support, VOTE NOW for:
    (1) Jason Liu and (2) Abdel Salem.

    Take Action

    Statistics Profile

    Francesca Farias

    2016
    Olympia Fencing Center
    Is this your profile? Register with your USFA ID to claim it.
    Claim profile
    Summary History Strength

    Win/loss statistics

    2025-2026 2024-2025 2023-2024 2022-2023 Before 2022 All time
    Victories 105 23 - - - 128
    Losses 68 24 - - - 92
    Win ratio 60.7% 48.9% - - - 58.2%
    Pool victories 84 19 - - - 103
    Pool losses 48 19 - - - 67
    Pool win ratio 63.6% 50.0% - - - 60.6%
    DE victories 21 4 - - - 25
    DE losses 20 5 - - - 25
    DE win ratio 51.2% 44.4% - - - 50.0%

    Seasons start on August 1 and end on July 31.

    Scores

    2025-2026 2024-2025 2023-2024 2022-2023 Before 2022 All time
    Easy wins† 36 7 - - - 43
    Easy wins % 34.3% 30.4% - - - 33.6%
    Close wins‡ 24 10 - - - 34
    Close wins % 22.9% 43.5% - - - 26.6%
    Close losses‡ 22 9 - - - 31
    Close losses % 32.4% 37.5% - - - 33.7%
    Big losses† 15 8 - - - 23
    Big losses % 22.1% 33.3% - - - 25.0%

    † Easy victories or big losses are 4+ touches in pools, 7+ in standard DEs, and 5+ in veteran or youth DEs.

    ‡ Close bouts are 1 touch or fewer in pools, 3 or fewer in standard DEs, and 2 or fewer in veteran or youth DEs.

    Bouts with time expired

    2025-2026 2024-2025 2023-2024 2022-2023 Before 2022 All time
    Victories 9 2 - - - 11
    Victories % 8.6% 8.7% - - - 8.6%
    Losses 14 4 - - - 18
